info.text: Life is a race, let's learn to play it.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: You can either win or lose life.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: In life you never really know what's going to happen; it's a gamble.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: With life, quitters can never win.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: With our lives, we set off on our own adventures.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life can be a competition, or a journey.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: With our life we can play safe of take risks.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Sometimes with life we just need to sit back and have some fun.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life has so many participants, some will win and some will lose.
